inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Exact conversion factor: 1 long ton = 1016.0469088 kg (based on 1 lb = 0.45359237 kg). Editable for traceability.

businessContext_i18n.en: Exact conversion factor: 1 long ton = 1016.0469088 kg (based on 1 lb = 0.45359237 kg). Editable for traceability.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesin dönüşüm faktörü: 1 uzun ton = 1016,0469088 kg (1 lb = 0,45359237 kg esas alınır). İzlenebilirlik için düzenlenebilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Exakter Umrechnungsfaktor: 1 Long Ton = 1016,0469088 kg (basierend auf 1 lb = 0,45359237 kg). Für Rückverfolgbarkeit bearbeitbar.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de conversion exact : 1 tonne longue = 1016,0469088 kg (basé sur 1 lb = 0,45359237 kg). Modifiable pour traçabilité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de conversión exacto: 1 tonelada larga = 1016.0469088 kg (basado en 1 lb = 0.45359237 kg). Editable para trazabilidad.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عامل التحويل الدقيق: 1 طن طويل = 1016.0469088 كجم (بناءً على 1 رطل = 0.45359237 كجم). قابل للتعديل لضمان إمكانية التتبع.
